LanguageData.Ammo_44-40Winchester_FMJ.label: .44-40 Winchester (FMJ)
LanguageData.Ammo_44-40Winchester_FMJ.description: Ancient mid-late 19th century bullet, originally loaded with 40 grains of blackpowder. Used in various repeating rifles and revolvers.
LanguageData.Ammo_44-40Winchester_AP.label: .44-40 Winchester (AP)
LanguageData.Ammo_44-40Winchester_AP.description: Ancient mid-late 19th century bullet, originally loaded with 40 grains of blackpowder. Used in various repeating rifles and revolvers.
LanguageData.Ammo_44-40Winchester_HP.label: .44-40 Winchester (HP)
LanguageData.Ammo_44-40Winchester_HP.description: Ancient mid-late 19th century bullet, originally loaded with 40 grains of blackpowder. Used in various repeating rifles and revolvers.
LanguageData.Ammo_44-40Winchester_Incendiary.label: .44-40 Winchester (AP-I)
LanguageData.Ammo_44-40Winchester_Incendiary.descript: Ancient mid-late 19th century bullet, originally loaded with 40 grains of blackpowder. Used in various repeating rifles and revolvers.
LanguageData.Ammo_44-40Winchester_HE.label: .44-40 Winchester (AP-HE)
LanguageData.Ammo_44-40Winchester_HE.description: Ancient mid-late 19th century bullet, originally loaded with 40 grains of blackpowder. Used in various repeating rifles and revolvers.
LanguageData.Ammo_44-40Winchester_Sabot.label: .44-40 Winchester (Sabot)
LanguageData.Ammo_44-40Winchester_Sabot.description: Ancient mid-late 19th century bullet, originally loaded with 40 grains of blackpowder. Used in various repeating rifles and revolvers.
